behavior.name: Capture and Calibrate Hand-Eye
behavior.author: Gabriel Novas
behavior.description:
FULL Hand-Eye Calibration Behavior:
PHASE 1: AUTO-LAUNCH: MoveIt + RViz open automatically PHASE 2: YOU CONTROL: Move robot with MoveIt interface CAPTURE: Press SPACE at each pose - Images: /calibrations/extrinsic_calibration/pictures/ - Poses: /calibrations/extrinsic_calibration/robot_poses/
PHASE 3: AUTO-DETECT: charuco_hand_eye detects Charuco - Uses intrinsic calibration: /calibrations/camera_intrinsics.yaml - Saves detections: /calibrations/extrinsic_calibration/charuco_table_poses/
PHASE 4: AUTO-CALIBRATE: VISP calculates final calibration - Main result: /calibrations/camera_extrinsics.yaml - Extrinsic matrices: /calibrations/extrinsic_matrix.yaml - Compact format with T_w2c and T_c2w for integration
FINAL RESULTS: - /home/drims/drims_ws/calibrations/camera_extrinsics.yaml (detailed calibration) - /home/drims/drims_ws/calibrations/extrinsic_matrix.yaml (compact format) - /home/drims/drims_ws/calibrations/extrinsic_calibration/charuco_table_poses/ (detections) - /home/drims/drims_ws/calibrations/calibration_results/camera_extrinsics.ini (INI format) - /home/drims/drims_ws/calibrations/calibration_results/camera_extrinsics.yaml (detailed copy)

param.name: total_poses
param.label: Total Poses
param.hint: Number of poses to capture (minimum 5, maximum 50)

param.name: eye_in_hand
param.label: Eye-in-Hand
param.hint: True if camera on robot, False if fixed

param.name: calibration_file_name
param.label: Calibration File
param.hint: Base name for calibration files (without extension)

param.name: use_fake_hardware
param.label: Use Fake Hardware
param.hint: True for simulation, False for real robot

param.name: output_folder
param.label: Output Folder
param.hint: Root folder where results will be saved
